topics: Introduction to Machine Learning and Data Preprocessing
Machine Learning: Definition, Scope, and Types of Learning
Data Preprocessing: Data Cleaning and Handling Missing Data
Outlier Detection and Treatment
Data Transformation: Normalization and Standardization
Feature Engineering, Feature Selection, and Extraction Techniques
Encoding Categorical Variables: One-hot Encoding and Label Encoding
Supervised Learning Techniques: Regression Analysis
Simple and Multiple Linear Regression
Preventing Overfitting: Regularization
Classification Methods: Decision Trees
Decision Tree Construction, Impurity Measures (Gini Index, Entropy), and Pruning
Support Vector Machines (SVM): Linear SVM, Kernel Trick, and Non-linear SVM
Neural Networks and Deep Learning: Introduction to Neural Networks
Perceptron: Model and Limitations
Multilayer Feedforward Networks: Architecture and Flow of Information
Activation Functions
Training Neural Networks: Backpropagation Algorithm, Derivation and Implementation
Gradient Descent Optimization: Batch, Mini-batch, and Stochastic
Techniques for Improving Convergence: Learning Rate Schedules and Momentum
Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN): Basic Architecture, Convolutional Layers, Pooling Layers, and Fully Connected Layers
Unsupervised Learning: Clustering (K-means, Hierarchical, DBSCAN)
Dimensionality Reduction: t-SNE
Model Evaluation, Validation, and Optimization
Performance Metrics: Confusion Matrix, Precision, Recall, F1-score, R-squared
Validation Techniques: k-fold, Stratified, Leave-one-out
Hyperparameter Tuning: Grid Search, Random Search
Ensemble Methods: Bagging, Boosting (AdaBoost, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost)
Project Topic Suggestions: Customer Segmentation for Marketing, Anomaly Detection in Network Traffic, Speech Emotion Recognition, Traffic Sign Recognition, Breast Cancer Prediction
